description: CompositionBlack polo t-shirt made of 100% viscose, has short sleeves with ruffles and a short buttoned placket with frills around itFittingSlimWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not wring or bleachFlat dry in shadeWarm ironCelebrate femininity in style with this scullers t-shirt.
